phases.name: Write security benchmark loader test
phases.reasoning: Add test_security_benchmarks_load test to src/cmd/autoresearch/benchmarks.rs that validates all 5 security benchmark cases load correctly, have non-empty code/context, have must_find entries, and include all expected case names. This test will fail (red) until the benchmark files are created.

phases.name: Create all 5 security benchmark cases
phases.reasoning: Create 15 files across 5 directories: toctou-race, missing-transaction, production-unwraps, vulnerable-dependencies, command-injection. Each directory gets code.rs (buggy Rust code), context.md (description), and expected.json (must_find/must_not_flag). Content is specified verbatim in the design doc. Validate all JSON files with python3 -m json.tool, verify consistent location format, and run the test from phase 01 to confirm green.
